title: DHGMCH Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 Dental House Staff Posts
description: The Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital (DHGMCH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Dental House Staff Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their BDS can apply for the DHGMCH Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process,...
